gameTitle: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition
overview: Classic RTS covering medieval history with 42 civilizations, 4 ages of progression, and competitive multiplayer. Players gather resources, build armies, and defeat opponents through military, economic, or wonder victory.
coreMechanics: Four ages: Dark, Feudal, Castle, Imperial
Four resources: Food, Wood, Gold, Stone

terminology.TC: Town Center - produces villagers, age up point
terminology.FC: Fast Castle - rushing to Castle Age quickly
terminology.Rush: Early military aggression (Drush, Flush, Scout rush)

commonQuestions: How many villagers on each resource?
How do I defend against a rush?
How do I improve my economy?
insiderTips: Constant villager production is #1 priority - never stop making vils from TC
General ratio: 6 sheep, 4 wood, 1-2 boar, then flexible
Learn one solid build order before experimenting
Archers beat infantry, cavalry beats archers, infantry beats cavalry
Monks can convert any unit - protect them or kill them first
Always be researching something - idle time = wasted resources
Scout enemy in Dark/Feudal age - information wins games
Stone walls are expensive - use palisade walls early

progressionSystem.military: Unlock stronger units and upgrades each age
